```sh
syncweaver --help
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(["syncweaver", "--help"], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
```

```sh
syncweaver --version
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(["syncweaver", "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
```
